div1.entryFree:
Mongrel, subst. a dog of a mixed breed: hounds and greyhounds, --s, spaniels, curs, Mcb. III, 1, 93. mastiff, greyhound, m. grim, Lr. III, 6, 71 (Ff mongrel, grim; Qq mongrel, grim-hound). Term of reproach: where's that m.? Lr. I, 4, 53.
Adjectively: son and heir of a m. bitch, Lr. II, 2, 24. Twice applied to Ajax by Thersites: Troil. II, 1, 14. V, 4, 14 (perhaps on account of his father being a Greek and his mother a Trojan).
